title: Luffy Breaks Through Krieg’s Arsenal — Part 2
scene: On pages 7–10, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Luffy keeps pushing Don Krieg backward, proving that Krieg’s weapons cannot fully stop him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It explores every time it hits something...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Damn, the longer the fight goes on, the worse off he'll be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's the end of the line for you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Damn it, I can't fight at full strength by jumping across these little "islands"...

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: Looks like the Don will settle the fight quickly enough...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: that "great war spear" of his creates a stronger explosion the stronger he swings it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even though that spear made from his 2 shoulder plates weighs over 1 ton, he swings it around like it's nothing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's undeniable proof that our don's the strongest!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
